title: Arena Event
subtitle: The Gamemakers have decided to intervene.

events.text: {name} is engulfed in a fire started by the Gamemakers.
{name} is killed by wolf mutts.
{name} is struck by lightning.
{name} is caught in an earthquake and crushed by falling rocks.
{name} is swept away by a flash flood.
{name} survives the fire that engulfs their area.
{name} escapes the wolf mutts.
{name} survives the lightning strike.
{name} survives the earthquake.
{name} survives the flash flood.
{name} and {name2} are caught in a fire started by the Gamemakers. {name} survives.
{name} and {name2} are caught in a fire started by the Gamemakers. {name2} survives.
{name} and {name2} are attacked by wolf mutts. {name} survives.
{name} and {name2} are attacked by wolf mutts. {name2} survives.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} are caught in a fire. Only {name} survives.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} are caught in a fire. Only {name2} survives.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} are caught in a fire. Only {name3} survives.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} are caught in an earthquake. Only {name} survives.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} are caught in an earthquake. Only {name2} survives.
While fighting, {name} and {name2} lose their balance, roll down a jagged hillside, and die.
{name} accidentally makes contact with spiny, lethal plant life.
{name} flails their weapon around, accidentally killing {name2}.
